Why KRONOS?

Our Promise to You

Every watch. Every customer. Every time.
01
💰

Unbeatable PricesStarting from RM29

From everyday accessories to premium timepieces — RM29 to RM599. Quality watches without breaking the bank.

02
🤝

Cash on DeliveryTaman Bukit Indah

Meet us at 8th Avenue, Taman Bukit Indah, JB. Inspect the watch in person — only pay when you're satisfied.

03
🎨

14 Models AvailableTissot · Seiko · Rolex

Swiss precision, Japanese craftsmanship, and premium accessories. A watch for every personality and occasion.

04
💳

Flexible PaymentCards, TnG & Cash

Pay via credit/debit card (Buy Me a Coffee), Touch 'n Go eWallet, or good old cash at COD. Your choice.

How to Get Yours

Meet Us in
Taman Bukit Indah

See it first. Love it. Then pay.
8th Avenue (Jalan Indah 8)
Taman Bukit Indah
81200 Johor Bahru, Johor · Near AEON Bukit Indah Mall
📍 Open Google Maps →
1

WhatsApp Us First

Message +60 16-673 0669 to confirm your preferred model and COD appointment.

2

Come to the Location

Meet us at 8th Avenue, Taman Bukit Indah. We'll be ready and waiting.

3

Inspect & Try It On

Check the watch yourself. Feel the quality, test the fit. No rush.

4

Pay & Walk Away Happy

Pay by TnG, credit card, or cash. Take your new watch home!

Payment Method at COD
☕

Buy Me a Coffee

tinypawtv · Credit & Debit Card Accepted

💳 Pay by Credit / Debit Card

Buy Me a Coffee accepts Visa & Mastercard. The platform charges in USD, so use this formula:

Conversion Formula
Price (RM) ÷ 4.1 = USD amount to enter
Quick reference:
RM149 (Tissot PRX)≈ USD 36.34
RM199 (Le Locle / Lume)≈ USD 48.54
RM399 (Rolex Datejust)≈ USD 97.32
RM599 (Rolex GMT II)≈ USD 146.10
RM159 (Seiko Presage)≈ USD 38.78
RM179 (Seiko Chrono)≈ USD 43.66
RM29 (Leather Strap)≈ USD 7.07

* ÷4.1 is an estimate. Actual rate depends on your bank's exchange rate at the time of payment.

Scan QR Code to open payment page
Scan with your phone camera → enter the correct USD amount
☕ Open Buy Me a Coffee

⚠️ Buy Me a Coffee does not support pre-filled amounts — please enter the correct USD amount manually using the table above.

TnG

Touch 'n Go eWallet

Send to our number

TnG Number
016-673 0669
1
Open TnG eWallet, tap "Send"
2
Enter number 016-673 0669
3
Enter the exact product price (RM)
4
Screenshot the receipt & send via WhatsApp
📲 Open Touch 'n Go App
💵 Cash Payment at COD

Bring the exact cash amount for your chosen watch. Pay directly to us after you've inspected the item and are fully satisfied.

🔒 Secure · Transparent · Zero Risk
